name: Awabi Sakami (Sweet Cooked Abalone)
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the can of abalone into a small saucepan and add water.
2. Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
3. Add sake and sugar, cook another 5 minutes.
4. Stir in soy sauce and continue to cook for 2-3 more minutes.
5. Cool to room temperature, slice the abalone into 1/2-inch thick slices and serve.
